title: Dual Friction Mapping of Urban Pedestrian Spaces

creators.name: Eminoğlu, Yusuf
creators.affiliation: Department of City and Regional Planning, Dokuz Eylül University; LUQAA - Lab of Urban Analytics and Quantitative Analysis

creators.name: Çubukçu, Kemal Mert
creators.affiliation: Department of City and Regional Planning, Dokuz Eylül University; LUQAA - Lab of Urban Analytics and Quantitative Analysis

description: Public companion repository for a study modelling sidewalk-level pedestrian friction in Izmir, Türkiye using street-view visual analytics, geospatial indicators, and geographically neural network weighted regression.
